short_text: Santner to Kyewuta, Caught by Mitchell!! Drifting in nicely on a fuller length, Kyewuta looks to hit it across the line
full_text: Santner to Kyewuta, Caught by Mitchell!! Drifting in nicely on a fuller length, Kyewuta looks to hit it across the line but gets a thick outside edge which is pouched by the slip fielder.

full_text: Santner to Kyewuta, no run, flighted delivery on middle, Kyewuta slogs across the line but is beaten on the outside edge. The ball turns away a lot and that's what saves him

full_text: Southee to Juma Miyagi, Lbw!! Miyagi has been trapped in front but he takes the review. Looked plumb that. Was a fuller length ball that seamed in from outside off, Miyagi played down the wrong line and got caught in front. Over to ball-tracking and it returns three reds.

full_text: Southee to Achelam, Lbw!! Plumb in front! Length ball seaming in from around off, Achelam shuffles a bit in a bid to flick it across but plays all around it to get struck on the pads. Kept a bit low and led to the batter's downfall.

full_text: Ravindra to Masaba, byes, 2 runs, floated around off, Masaba looks to sweep it across but misses. Conway gets beaten as the ball runs behind him. He got some pad on it so the ball slowed down. The batters take a couple

full_text: Ravindra to Masaba, no run, tossed up well outside off, Masaba shuffles across and goes for the big sweep but is beaten by the away turn. Conway takes the bails off in a flash but it seems like Masaba dragged his back foot back inside the crease in the nick of time. The replay shows that he is fine

full_text: Ravindra to Riazat Ali Shah, Caught by Conway!! Ravindra strikes with a beauty! Tossed up ball on a length on middle, turns and grips, Riazat Ali Shah is squared up in his stance and gets a thin outside edge. Conway takes it smartly.

full_text: Ferguson to Waiswa, Bowled!! Timber! 137kph pitched up ball swinging in from outside off, Waiswa looks to drive it down the ground but leaves a bat-pad gap. The ball goes through the gate and shatters the stumps.

full_text: Santner to Ronak Patel, Caught by Conway!! Another one bites the dust! Drifting in nicely towards leg-stump, Ronak Patel stays leg-side of the ball and looks to drive but the ball turns away and takes the outside edge. A sharp grab from Conway behind the stumps.

full_text: Boult to Waiswa, , Boult switches to round the wicket and dishes out a half-volley outside off. Waiswa waits for it, opens his bat-face and drives it past backward point to get the desired result

full_text: Boult to Waiswa, no run, yorker length ball outside off, swinging in, Waiswa looks to jam it out but is beaten on the inside edge

full_text: Boult to Waiswa, no run, New Zealand review for a lbw against Waiswa. Was a fuller length ball that swung in, from outside off, Waiswa looks to drive it down the ground but seems to have been beaten on the inside edge and struck on the pads. There's no bat involved. Ball-tracking shows that the iWaiswa survives

full_text: Southee to Waiswa, 1 run, fullish ball outside off, Waiswa plays it with an open bat face towards backward point to get off the mark

short_text: Southee to Alpesh Ramjani, Lbw!! Alpesh Ramjani has been caught in front but he takes the review. Was it pad or bat firs
full_text: Southee to Alpesh Ramjani, Lbw!! Alpesh Ramjani has been caught in front but he takes the review. Was it pad or bat first? Was a fuller length ball that shaped in a touch, Alpesh Ramjani played down the wrong line and seemed to have got pinged on the pads. The replays roll in. UltraEdge shows that he has been clearly struck on the pads. Over to ball-tracking and it returns three reds. Uganda are all at sea.

short_text: Southee to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, in the corridor of uncertainty, seams in a bit, Alpesh Ramjani knows where his off-st
full_text: Southee to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, in the corridor of uncertainty, seams in a bit, Alpesh Ramjani knows where his off-stump is and makes a watchful leave

full_text: Southee to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, yorker length ball on off, Alpesh Ramjani brings his bat down in time and blocks it watchfully

full_text: Southee to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, full ball wide outside off, Alpesh Ramjani doesn't go after it

short_text: Boult to Ronak Patel, no run, Ronak Patel has been given out lbw but he immediately takes the review. There were two noi
full_text: Boult to Ronak Patel, no run, Ronak Patel has been given out lbw but he immediately takes the review. There were two noises. Was a fuller length ball that shaped in a bit from outside off, Patel was caught in the crease as he looked to keep it out but seemed to have got struck on the pad first before the bat made contact. Time for the replays. UltraEdge reveals that it is clearly pad first. Over to ball-tracking and the

full_text: Boult to Ronak Patel, no run, fullish ball swinging in on midde, perhaps keeps a touch low, Ronak Patel adjusts in his stance to block it

full_text: Boult to Ronak Patel, no run, Boult switches to round the wicket and shapes in a full ball, Ronak Patel leans into it and eases it to covers

full_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, leg byes, 1 run, extra bounce from a length, Ronak Patel looks to work it across but it deflects off his pads towards square leg for a leg bye.

short_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, no run, in the channel outside off, straightens a bit after landing, Ronak Patel looks to have a
full_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, no run, in the channel outside off, straightens a bit after landing, Ronak Patel looks to have a feel for it but bails his bat out at the last moment

short_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, no run, pitched up ball attacking the stumps, Ronak Patel hangs back and blocks it towards short
full_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, no run, pitched up ball attacking the stumps, Ronak Patel hangs back and blocks it towards short mid-wicket

short_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, no run, fullish ball outside off, swinging away, Ronak Patel lets it go
full_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, no run, fullish ball outside off, swinging away, Ronak Patel lets it go

short_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, no run, a big appeal for an lbw is cut short! Fullish ball outside off, seams in this time, Rona
full_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, no run, a big appeal for an lbw is cut short! Fullish ball outside off, seams in this time, Ronak Patel is opened up in his stance and is hit high on the pads. Height might have been an issue there

short_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, no run, pitched up outside off, swinging away, Ronak Patel doesn't fiddle with it
full_text: Southee to Ronak Patel, no run, pitched up outside off, swinging away, Ronak Patel doesn't fiddle with it

short_text: Boult to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, back of a length ball on off, Alpesh Ramjani covers the line and keeps it out watchfull
full_text: Boult to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, back of a length ball on off, Alpesh Ramjani covers the line and keeps it out watchfully. Brilliant start from Boult

short_text: Boult to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, Boult doesn't get the hat-trick! A very full ball on off, swinging away, Alpesh Ramjani
full_text: Boult to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, Boult doesn't get the hat-trick! A very full ball on off, swinging away, Alpesh Ramjani is alert to it and blocks it down the track

short_text: Boult to Robinson Obuya, Bowled!! Knocked him over! That's a cracker. Fuller length ball swinging in substantially from
full_text: Boult to Robinson Obuya, Bowled!! Knocked him over! That's a cracker. Fuller length ball swinging in substantially from outside off, Robinson Obuya looks to drive it down the ground but leaves a bat-pad gap. The ball sneaks in through the gap and crashes into the off-stump. Top-class bowling from a quality bowler.

short_text: Boult to Simon Ssesazi, Lbw!! Boult strikes! A very full ball on middle and leg, swinging away, Simon Ssesazi is caught
full_text: Boult to Simon Ssesazi, Lbw!! Boult strikes! A very full ball on middle and leg, swinging away, Simon Ssesazi is caught in the crease as he looks to counter it but misses to get hit on the pads. The umpire has no hesitation to rule it out. That looked plumb in front.

short_text: Boult to Ronak Patel, 1 run, on a length on middle and leg, straightens a bit, Ronak Patel looks to work it across but g
full_text: Boult to Ronak Patel, 1 run, on a length on middle and leg, straightens a bit, Ronak Patel looks to work it across but gets a soft leading edge through point

short_text: Boult to Ronak Patel, no run, on the money first up is Boult as he swings this full ball towards off, Ronak Patel leans
full_text: Boult to Ronak Patel, no run, on the money first up is Boult as he swings this full ball towards off, Ronak Patel leans ahead a bit to keep it out

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Conway, , Short ball on leg and Conway helps it past the fielder at short fine leg with a gentle swivel.
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Conway, , Short ball on leg and Conway helps it past the fielder at short fine leg with a gentle swivel. No need to run for those as NZ get over the line within the powerplay

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Conway, , NZ just a boundary away from an emphatic win. Pitched up by the bowler on off and Conway drills
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Conway, , NZ just a boundary away from an emphatic win. Pitched up by the bowler on off and Conway drills it through the gap at cover for a glorious boundary

full_text: Riazat Ali Shah to Conway, , on the shorter side and well down the leg-side, that's another wide ball by Riazat Ali Shah. Only 9 more runs required now

full_text: Riazat Ali Shah to Conway, , short and punished! On the shorter side on leg and Conway pulls it away to the deep backward square leg boundary. NZ inching closer to an emphatic win

short_text: Riazat Ali Shah to Finn Allen, Caught by Achelam!! Pitched up by the bowler on leg and Finn Allen gets an edge as he tri
full_text: Riazat Ali Shah to Finn Allen, Caught by Achelam!! Pitched up by the bowler on leg and Finn Allen gets an edge as he tries to flick it away. Caught behind down the leg-side and that's a fine decision by the onfield umpire. Clear spike on UltraEdge and Finn has to walk back to the pavilion..
